scripts.typecheck: node ./node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @extropy/shared run build && node ./node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && node ./node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json
